article_meta.title: Metro An open letter from the heart of Iran to America – Don’t give up on us By California Post Staff Published March 7, 2026, 7:11 p.m

reasoning: Direction and magnitude are appropriate for a strongly pro-Trump, anti-Iran-regime open letter with no balancing prose. Confidence is well-calibrated. Minor attribution-rule slip: one key indicator includes a quoted word inside quotation marks.

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: Lean Right matches the article’s clear right-leaning advocacy; at worst one step from a plausible Right rating.
custom_reasoning.confidence_calibration: 0.85 reflects clear, consistent signals typical of strong opinion content favoring the right.
custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: Evidence mostly quotes the author’s own prose; one indicator includes a quoted word ('them'), a minor attribution violation under the strict rules.
